title: rubus henriquesii
intro: Rubus henriquesii is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, commonly known as a thorny raspberry or rose- raspberry. The plant is native to the island of Madeira in Portugal and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus henriquesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus henriquesii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
